events.description: Join us for country music, line dancing, hole-in-one golf challenges, prizes, and plenty of fun — all while giving back. Grab your boots and come out to support the pack!

tiers.name: Howl at the Hoedown Admission
tiers.description: Entry to the Howl at the Hoedown event. Line dancing, country music, golf challenges, prizes, food & drinks. 10% of sales supports Timberland Wolves Booster Program.

events.title: BOOT SCOOTIN' WITH THE PACK
events.detailDescription:
Join us for a fun, country-themed night supporting Timberland High School!


From 4 PM – 6 PM, we encourage all supporters, families, and friends to come out and show their support before the event transitions to 21+ starting at 7 PM ($25 Ticket Entry). Use code WOLVES20 FOR $5 OFF BEFORE 4/1/26. Food and Drinks are purchased separately but benefit the Timberland Football Program!


10% of all food and drink sales will be donated back to the Timberland Wolves Booster Program. Enjoy a golf hole-in-one challenge ($3000 HOLE-IN-ONE PAYOUT) with prizes, raffles, cold drinks, great food, country music, line dancing led by DJ Earl Draper.


Grab your boots and come support your Wolves for a great cause 🐺
